summary: WM Finance Iteration 6 - All new features tested successfully: Superadmin login (admin/220066mm), Telegram bot summary API (/bot/summary), Adesk Migration page (/settings/adesk), and FAQ page (/faq). Backend 100% pass rate (15/15 tests). Frontend 100% - all pages load correctly with proper UI elements.

issues: Console warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts library sizing issue during initial render (cosmetic only, carried over from iteration 5)

passed_tests: Backend: Superadmin login with admin/220066mm returns correct token and user with role='superadmin'
Backend: Superadmin wrong password correctly returns 401
Backend: /auth/me endpoint works for superadmin
Backend: /bot/summary with period='week' returns formatted Telegram message with financial data
Backend: /bot/summary with period='day' returns data for today
Backend: /bot/summary with period='month' returns data for month
Backend: /bot/summary with invalid token returns 401
Backend: /adesk/test-connection endpoint exists and responds
Backend: /adesk/drafts endpoint returns drafts array and stats
Backend: /analytics/summary regression test passed
Backend: /accounts endpoint regression test passed
Backend: /directions endpoint regression test passed
Backend: /categories endpoint regression test passed
Backend: /transactions endpoint regression test passed
Backend: /documents endpoint regression test passed
Frontend: Login page shows 'Логин или Email' field supporting both admin login and email
Frontend: Superadmin login (admin/220066mm) successfully redirects to dashboard
Frontend: FAQ page (/faq) loads with 'Справка и FAQ' header
Frontend: FAQ page shows sections: Начало работы, Рабочий стол, Операции, Аналитика
Frontend: FAQ accordion expansion works
Frontend: Adesk Migration page (/settings/adesk) loads with 'Миграция из Adesk' header
Frontend: Adesk Migration page has API token input field
Frontend: Adesk Migration page has 'Проверить' test connection button
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Справка и FAQ' link
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Миграция из Adesk' link
Frontend: Dashboard shows all 4 main cards (Доходы, Расходы, Прибыль, Деньги бизнеса)
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Super Admin' user name in bottom left
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Add minWidth/minHeight to ResponsiveContainer components to suppress Recharts console warnings (carried over from iteration 5)
seed_data_creation: Superadmin user auto-created on first login if not exists

mocked_apis.Adesk API (api.adesk.ru): MOCKED - requires real API token for actual migration

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 6 features working. New pages: /faq (FAQ with accordion sections), /settings/adesk (Adesk migration with API token connection). Superadmin login uses 'admin' as login (not email). Telegram bot summary API at /bot/summary requires user_token param and returns formatted markdown message for Telegram.

adesk_migration_page.note: Adesk API (api.adesk.ru) is external - requires real token for actual data migration
